message:
feat(pager): skip page-1 writes for WAL interior updates and track commits via frame scan

WAL commits that only modify non-header pages no longer force a page-1
write, reducing I/O. Add WalBackend::committed_txns_since_page() trait
method and its WalBackendAdapter implementation so the pager derives
exact commit sequences even for headerless commits. Conditional freelist
serialization avoids unnecessary work when freelist metadata is clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
